name: Booking OWASP HIGH Vulnerability Origin Analysis
description: Identify origin and dependency paths of HIGH severity findings from booking/target/owasp/dependency-check-report.html

entries.detail: Analysis and reporting performed using GPT-5.3-Codex.

entries.summary: Identified all HIGH vulnerability origins in booking OWASP report
entries.detail: Found 11 HIGH rows total: 1 from ch.qos.logback:logback-core:1.5.18, 9 from io.netty modules at 4.1.124.Final, and 1 from org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-http:11.0.26. All are reported as shaded content under booking-1.0.jar.

entries.summary: Documented HIGH vulnerability origin summary in booking docs
entries.detail: Created markdown summary with dependency origins, evidence line ranges, and dependency-tree provenance for HIGH findings.

entries.summary: Added remediation-priority section for HIGH dependency sources
entries.detail: Documented prioritized remediation sequence: P0 Netty (transitive via cloud-sdk-aws), P1 Jetty HTTP (via Dropwizard/Jetty path), P2 Logback core (via Dropwizard logging path). Included upgrade approach, risks, mitigations, and verification commands per dependency.

entries.summary: Updated booking docs with actionable remediation guidance
entries.detail: Extended the OWASP HIGH origin summary with a full remediation section and suggested incremental execution strategy (Netty -> Jetty -> Logback) with post-step validation expectations.
